conflictBlocks.oursContent:
Pick your event(s) and report type. Filters never hide explicitly
            selected events.
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
Pick your event(s), time window, and report type. Leave dates blank
            to include all events.

preservedBehaviors: useReportFilters initializes dateStart and dateEnd to empty strings
useReportFilters returns all expected filter state
fetchAccessibleShows checks for explicit show IDs
fetchAccessibleShows bypasses date/type filters when explicit shows are selected
ReportControls mentions that filters never hide explicitly selected events
fetchAccessibleShows applies start date filter independently
fetchAccessibleShows uses event date overlap logic
fetchAccessibleShows filters by event type when not all
fetchAccessibleShows checks RBAC for viewAll permissions
